title: Tripe Stew with Savory Flair
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender tripe and a blend of smoky and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: Tripe
ingredients.amount: 1 pound, cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add tripe; cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add smoked paprika, savory powder, and tomato paste; cook for 1 minute.
Add beef broth; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low; simmer, covered, until tripe is tender, about 2 hours.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
